name: callcontext::SetTimeToAnswer
title: callcontext::SetTimeToAnswer
description: Tells the simulation when it shall return the answer for the call. The answer will be returned after the given time.
Note that you can also use the AutoAnswerTimeNS property of a method provider endpoint to set the answer delay for all following calls.

parameters.name: timeMs
parameters.description: Relative time in milliseconds after which the call shall be returned.
